title: roasted tunisian parma ham tagine
description: a flavorful, cheese-pull, ayurvedic-sattvic-friendly dish featuring parma ham, miso-marinate, and roasted vegetables

ingredients.name: miso paste
ingredients.notes: use white or yellow miso for best results

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality oil for best flavor

ingredients.name: feta cheese
ingredients.notes: crumbly, tangy cheese is essential for best results

ingredients.name: ayurvedic cumin powder
ingredients.notes: optional, but recommended for best sattvic flavor

instructions: in a small bowl, mix together miso paste, apple cider vinegar, and 1 tbsp of olive oil.
add the onion, garlic, carrot, and celery to a large bowl and drizzle with the remaining 1 tbsp of olive oil.
toss to coat and spread on a baking sheet, making sure not to overlap the vegetables.
roast in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, or until tender and lightly browned.
while the vegetables are roasting, slice the parma ham into thin strips.
remove the vegetables from the oven and add the cherry tomatoes, sliced parma ham, feta cheese, parsley, cumin, coriander, paprika, garam masala, salt, and black pepper to the bowl.
toss to combine and transfer to a serving dish.
bake in the oven for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
remove from the oven and sprinkle with additional parsley if desired.
